<div align="center">

# 🌌 VAZH (واژ)
### The Ultimate Smart Routing & Multi-Platform Configuration Hub for Iran

[![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Multi--Client-blueviolet?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/itsyebekhe/vazh)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green?style=for-the-badge)](LICENSE)
[![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Stable-success?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/itsyebekhe/vazh)

---

**VAZH** is a powerful, unified routing core designed to completely optimize your internet traffic. By intelligently separating **Iranian Direct Traffic**, **International Proxy Traffic**, and **Ad/Malware Trackers**, it ensures the fastest, most stable connection possible across different operating systems and clients.

[🎯 Key Features](#-key-features) • [🚀 Quick Import](#-quick-import) • [🛠 Included Client Configs](#-included-client-configs)

</div>

---

## 🎯 Key Features

* 🚀 **Zero-Lag Failover:** Instantly adapts to network changes (Wi-Fi ⇄ Mobile Data) without dropping.
* 🛡️ **Advanced Ad & Tracker Blocking:** Top-priority rejection rules save your device's bandwidth and battery.
* ⚡ **Optimized DNS Infrastructure:** Hybrid DNS routing prevents leaks while resolving domestic platforms instantly via local nodes.
* 🧩 **Universal Compatibility:** One central source of truth for both traditional rule-set clients and modern JSON/deep-routing links.

---

## 🚀 Quick Import

Choose your client below to instantly import the optimized **vazh** routing rules.

### 📱 InTransit (incy)
Click the button below or copy the import URL directly into your InTransit app to deploy the dynamic routing schema.

<a href="incy:" style="display:inline-block; background-color:#6f42c1; color:white; padding:10px 20px; text-decoration:none; border-radius:8px; font-weight:bold; margin: 10px 0;">⚡ Import into InTransit</a>

Or copy the raw string:
```text
incy:统一... (truncated for preview)

```

### 🚀 Shadowrocket
To load the rock-solid .conf profile containing tailored DNS optimizations, custom hooks for infrastructure systems (*.apple.com, *.microsoft.com), and advanced fail-safes:
 1. Copy the URL to the Shadowrocket configuration file:
   ```text
   [https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itsyebekhe/vazh/main/shadowrocket.conf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/itsyebekhe/vazh/main/shadowrocket.conf)
   
   ```
 2. Open **Shadowrocket** ➜ Tap **Settings** ➜ **Config** ➜ **Add Configuration** ➜ Paste the URL.

## 🛠 Included Client Configs
| Client | Config Type | Core Optimizations | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| **InTransit** | Deep JSON Hook (incy://) | Smart DNS, Advanced Geo-site filtering | 🟢 Active |
| **Shadowrocket** | Optimized .conf Profile | TCP Fast Open, Session Ticket Resumption, DPI Failover | 🟢 Active |
| **Clash / Sing-Box** | *Coming Soon* | - | 🟡 Planned |

<div align="center">
### 🤝 Contributions & Support
This repo is fully open-source. If you run into broken routing domains or problematic local addresses, feel free to open an Issue or submit a PR. Let's keep the connection fluid.
</div>
